qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: JWT auth whitelist path traversal bypass exposes protected flag and export APIs
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding identifies the same JWT middleware whitelist bug as the advisory: pre-fix pkg/config/middleware.go accepts attacker-controlled req.URL.Path values with strings.HasPrefix before downstream path normalization, so /api/v1/health/../... bypasses auth and reaches protected flag and export handlers. Upstream fix fe83dc87 replaces that prefix check with util.HasSafePrefix.

selected_finding.title: JWT auth whitelist path traversal bypass exposes protected flag and export APIs

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected finding matches the advisory-described HTTP middleware path-normalization auth bypass, and the copied PoC reproduced end-to-end unauthorized access to protected flag and export endpoints on the pinned vulnerable commit while direct canonical routes remained protected.
evidence: The advisory describes improper path-normalization handling in OpenFlagr's HTTP middleware whitelist; the finding describes the same raw-path prefix whitelist bypass using /api/v1/health/../... to skip JWT verification and then reach protected handlers after normalization.

At vulnerable commit 2dc5d1495e73737b6273a10514c83f34907a7294, pkg/config/middleware.go whitelists JWT prefix paths with strings.HasPrefix(req.URL.Path, p); upstream fix fe83dc87aa404a57554aa5839ac450f55c203570 replaces that check with util.HasSafePrefix.

/Users/lumi/ziyue/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_692d0267/.judge/poc_runs/jwt_auth_whitelist_path_bypass/run.log shows direct /api/v1/flags status 401 and direct /api/v1/export/eval_cache/json status 401, but bypassed /api/v1/health/../flags status 200 and bypassed /api/v1/health/../export/eval_cache/json status 200 without any token.

/Users/lumi/ziyue/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_692d0267/.judge/poc_runs/jwt_auth_whitelist_path_bypass/run.log also shows bypassed flag creation status 200 and EVOHUNT_JWT_BYPASS_CONFIRMED, proving unauthorized protected action execution and protected data exposure through the advisory root cause.

poc_executions.observed_effect: With JWT auth enabled on the pinned vulnerable commit, direct requests to /api/v1/flags and /api/v1/export/eval_cache/json returned 401, while unauthenticated curl --path-as-is requests to /api/v1/health/../flags and /api/v1/health/../export/eval_cache/json returned 200; the bypassed POST created jwt-bypass-flag and the bypassed export path exposed data including that created flag.
